events.label: assistant
events.text: Written to `/app/answer.json`. The condition (NM cable within 1¼ in. of the stud face with no nail plate) is a direct violation of NEC 300.4(D), which requires a minimum 1/16 in. steel plate whenever cable clearance from the finished framing face is less than 1¼ in. — result: **fail**, high risk due to puncture/shock/fire hazard once wallboard fasteners are driven, with corrective action to install nail plates before cover-up.
